body.title: Background job result silently dropped — never posted to channel
body.result: Replaced inline DB write in _announce_completed_jobs with post_to_channel() (PG+JSONL fallback). Changed silent loginfo to log.warning. Root cause (CC messages going to background) also fixed by D313.
body.description: Background jobs occasionally complete (status=completed) but their result is never posted to channel. Seen with job d573731e: job file shows completed at 14:12:49 but channel ends at Started background job. result_path is empty. Completion queue handler likely has a silent failure path when result is large or contains certain content. Check job_manager completion callback and channel post step for swallowed exceptions.
